channel.title: EMERGENZ Biosecurity Intelligence Dashboard
channel.description: High-severity biosecurity signals and recent authority/media coverage. Generated 2026-06-01T04:43:19.554Z.

item.title: [ACTION] Ebola disease — Bundibugyo virus, Democratic Republic of the Congo
item.description: WHO has declared the Bundibugyo ebolavirus outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, with Africa CDC confirming active outbreak monitoring in both the DRC and Uganda. Per WHO Disease Outbreak News (29 May 2026), the DRC has reported 125 confirmed cases (17 deaths) and 906 suspected cases (223 suspected deaths, as of 27 May), and Uganda has reported 9 confirmed cases (1 death). Multi-health-zone spread in eastern DRC continues; cross-border movement elevates geographic risk.

item.title: [CONCERN] Andes virus hantavirus cluster — MV Hondius travel-linked
item.description: Andes hantavirus cluster linked to a South America–Antarctica expedition cruise aboard MV Hondius. 13 reported cases (11 confirmed, 2 probable) and 3 deaths across multiple countries, with multinational case-finding and post-exposure monitoring continuing.

item.title: [CONCERN] Measles — United States
item.description: CDC confirmed 1,983 measles cases across 40 jurisdictions in 2026 (as of May 28), representing 30 outbreaks with 93% of cases outbreak-associated. No deaths reported in 2026. U.S. kindergartener MMR coverage has declined to 92.5% (from 95.2% in 2019–2020), leaving approximately 286,000 kindergarteners unvaccinated — the structural driver of sustained outbreak activity.

item.title: [CONCERN] Mpox — clade I, Africa & travel-linked importations
item.description: Mpox clade I and travel-linked importation monitoring remain operationally significant for clinical recognition, specimen routing, and laboratory clade differentiation. Verify current country-level trends and any importation details against specific Africa CDC, WHO, or CDC updates before publication.

item.title: [CONCERN] Cholera — sub-Saharan Africa, including Republic of Congo
item.description: Africa CDC reported 40,707 cholera cases continent-wide from January 1 through May 14, 2026 — a 65% year-over-year decline compared to the same period in 2025. Despite the overall volume decrease, case fatality ratios remain elevated in conflict-affected and low-healthcare-access settings. Sudan, Ethiopia, Somalia, Mozambique, Malawi, and Zimbabwe continue reporting active transmission.

item.title: [CONCERN] Chikungunya — global outbreak activity
item.description: Chikungunya surveillance remains active across parts of the Americas and other mosquito-active regions. Verify current country burden and case totals against specific PAHO or WHO updates before publication.

item.title: BBC Health: Daily pill doubles survival time for pancreatic cancer patients
item.description: The drug, daraxonrasib, has been hailed as a breakthrough in managing the deadliest of all the major cancers.

item.title: BBC Health: Checks reveal young women with deadly 'silent' heart risk
item.description: Sudden cardiac death can happen without warning, and it's not just a problem for sporty young men, say experts.

item.description: ASCO Day 3: A huge advance for pancreatic cancer, a let down for Akeso and Summit, and a new approach to immunotherapy.
